model_output_allowance_policy: greatest allowance actually authorized after input; no caller cap on native calls; continue on length
baseline_boundary: e8aa007 — H-039 normalized agentic planning contract; sole run-002 amendment

inherited_artifacts.regeneration_boundary: master plan and downstream chapters only

amendment.mechanism: replace denormalized plan bookkeeping with one authoritative semantic blueprint and outcome-based review

later_writer_arm.status: deferred until after the Opus baseline and official route availability

stages_rerun_because: H-039 changes planning semantics, so plan and chapters are invalidated; accepted research and framing are not.
notes: H-039 is falsified if planning again consumes three review cycles without a chapter or if deleted fields cause a chapter-level method/evidence failure. No reviewer blocker may be only a cross-table, occurrence-count, or prewritten-SUMMARY mismatch.
